pageTitle: Personal Assistant Job Leads — Live from Indeed
pageSubtitle: Curated Miami-area listings with context for outreach.
friendNotes: Trivium Group is the strongest lead — direct PA to CEO, named founder, very active online, well-funded Amazon agency.
For emails, tools like Hunter.io (free 25 searches/month) or Apollo.io (free tier) are more reliable than scraping — enter the company domain to surface verified emails.
LinkedIn InMail or a connection request with a note often outperforms cold email for PA roles.

details.label: Est. revenue
details.value: $300M+ in client Amazon sales managed; agency revenue est. $5–20M/yr

details.label: Email
details.value: Not publicly listed — contact via LinkedIn or triviumco.com

leads.tip: Best bet — this is a PA to CEO role directly. Mina Elias is very active on LinkedIn and social media. A DM on LinkedIn is likely to get a response.

details.label: CEO / Owner
details.value: Not publicly surfaced — appears to be a small private company

details.label: Notes
details.value: Supporting management + President per listing description

leads.tip: Apply directly through Indeed and ask to speak with the hiring manager. The listing mentions President's contacts, emails, and schedule.
